---
title: "NDB"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx)


library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
```

```{r}
list.files("../xlsx/test/sec")
```

```{r}
df_inj_mon_reg <- readRDS("../rds/inj/mon/df_inj_mon_reg")

df_test_mon_reg <- readRDS("../rds/test/mon/df_test_mon_reg")

df_surg_mon_reg <- readRDS("../rds/surg/mon/df_surg_mon_reg")
```


```{r}
#regular long

df_inj_mon_rl <- df_inj_mon_reg %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = ends_with("月"),
               names_to = "MON_jp",
               values_to = "VALUE") %>%
  mutate(MON = str_remove(MON_jp, "月")) %>%
  mutate(MON = case_when(as.numeric(MON) <= 9 ~ paste0("0", MON),
                         .default = as.character(MON))) %>%
  mutate(YMD = paste0(YEAR_str, "-", MON, "-01")) %>%
  mutate(YMD = as_date(YMD))
```

```{r}
df_inj_mon_rl
```


```{r}
save_mon_long <- function(x){
  x %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = ends_with("月"),
               names_to = "MON_jp",
               values_to = "VALUE") %>%
    mutate(MON = str_remove(MON_jp, "月")) %>%
    mutate(MON = case_when(as.numeric(MON) <= 9 ~ paste0("0", MON),
                         .default = as.character(MON))) %>%
    mutate(YMD = paste0(YEAR_str, "-", MON, "-01")) %>%
    mutate(YMD = as_date(YMD)) %>%
    mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE, POINT), ~ na_if(.x, "-"))) %>%
    mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE, POINT), ~ replace_na(.x, "0"))) %>%
    mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE, POINT), ~ as.numeric(.x)))
}
```


```{r}
type <- c("inj", "test", "surg")

#path <- paste0("../rds/", type, "/dem/df_", type,  "_dem_reg")
```


```{r}
for (i in 1:length(type)){
  from <- paste0("../rds/", type[i], "/mon/df_", type[i],  "_mon_reg")
  
  to <- paste0("../df/mon/df_mon_", type[i], "_reg")
  
  readRDS(from) %>% save_mon_long() %>% saveRDS(to)
}
```


```{r}
for (i in 1:length(type)){
  from <- paste0("../rds/", type[i], "/mon/df_", type[i],  "_mon_add")
  
  to <- paste0("../df/mon/df_mon_", type[i], "_add")
  
  readRDS(from) %>% save_mon_long() %>% saveRDS(to)
}
```
